title: Karlstad, Värmland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Karlstad, Värmland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Karlstad is a city in Värmland with a population of 95,000. A sunny lakeside city on Lake Vänern, known for its beaches, outdoor activities, and Karlstad University.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
